name: English Jam Tarts
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup Less than 1 Cup Ice Cold Water
1 tsp Grated Lemon Rind or Extract
recipeInstructions:
1. Using knives, cut together flour and butter until the butter is small marble size.
2. Make a well in the center of the mixture, then add sweetener, egg yolk, water (less than 1 cup), and lemon rind.
3. Quickly combine all ingredients to form a dough.
4. Place the dough on a floured surface and knead lightly for 5 minutes.
5. Roll the dough into a ball and chill in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
6. Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch (about 0.25 inches).
7. Cut the dough into 4-inch squares.
8. Place a tablespoonful of jam in the center of each square, then fold the dough into a triangle and seal the edges.
9. Place the tarts on oiled cookie sheets.
10. Bake in a preheated oven at 400 degrees for 10 minutes.
11. Tarts will be golden brown when done. Serve warm or cooled.
Makes 12 tarts
